ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Music genre associated with the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the profile image of the artist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist profile was last updated */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_nationality FOREIGN KEY ("nationality") REFERENCES nationalities ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover image of the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album's information was last updated */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label associated with the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album containing the track */,
  "track_uri" TEXT /* URI of the track used for streaming */,
  "track_popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track's information was last updated */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicator for explicit content */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track's position in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre's information was last updated */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nationalities" (
  "nationality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nationality */,
  "nationality_name" TEXT /* Name of the nationality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nationality */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the nationality was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the nationality's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nationality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming event */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that was streamed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who streamed the track */,
  "stream_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was streamed */,
  "stream_type" TEXT /* Type of streaming event (e.g., play, skip) */,
  "stream_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the streaming event in milliseconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for streaming */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used for streaming */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "preferred_genres" TEXT /* User's preferred genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who engaged with the platform */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., like, playlist addition) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement occurred */,
  "engagement_count" INTEGER /* Count of the engagement events */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement event occurred */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the engagement event was last updated */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value associated with the engagement event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "data_coverage_start" TEXT /* Start date of the data covered in the report */,
  "data_coverage_end" TEXT /* End date of the data covered in the report */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
